name: chain_acquisition_show_hn_added_api_key_sup
method: [ACQUISITION] Show HN: Added API key support to my AI writing assistant extension

stages.task: Scrape HN daily for 'Show HN' posts mentioning browser extension + API key/BYOK/bring your own key. Filter by >10 points.

Score each extension: niche fit (writing/productivity/AI = HIGH), BYOK already implemented (YES = fork/clone candidate, NO = enhancement opportunity), open source (YES = fork+rebrand path), monetization gap (free only = opportunity).

For HIGH-score open source extensions: clone, add premium tier + Stripe, deploy to Chrome/Firefox store. For HIGH-score closed extensions: build competing clone with BYOK + one differentiator. Route to app_factory_autopilot.py.
